title: Missing check for has_portnum before using portnum value
description:
In `parse_data()` (lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c), portnum handling correctly checks `info->has_portnum` before use. Good.

The `unsupported_operations` table entries with `has_portnum=true` and `lichen_meshtastic_adapter_unsupported_operations()` (which returns static table) rely on caller following the contract clarified in adapter.h: check `has_portnum` before using `portnum`; when false, `portnum` is unset.

Not a bug. The docs(meshtastic) commit clarified the has_portnum contract.
notes: Updated description to remove fragile hard-coded line numbers per kimi-review (project-LICHEN-qc8e). References now use function names `parse_data()`, `lichen_meshtastic_adapter_unsupported_operations()`. Attribution to original closer preserved.
